name: Dymo 450 Label Printer Set up for Neto

For instructions on how to do this, please check your "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://download.dymo.com/dymo/user-guides/LabelWriter/LW450Series/UG/LabelWriter_UserGuide_en-US.pdf", "children": [{"text": "DYMO 450 Turbo instruction manual"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set the Print Preferences in Windows"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the Start menu and and navigate to the "}, {"text": "Control Panel", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "Devices and Printers", "bold": true}, {"text": " icon and open this."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Right click on the DYMO printer and select "}, {"text": "Printer Properties", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Printer Properties window, click "}, {"text": "Preferences", "bold": true}, {"text": " at the bottom and then "}, {"text": "Advanced", "bold": true}, {"text": " on the right."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This will open a window that shows the below settings. This allows you to verify that the paper is set to the same type of label you loaded earlier."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Update your label template in Neto by Maropost"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to the "}, {"text": "Print Doc", "bold": true}, {"text": " templates: "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "System Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the left hand navigation menu and then select "}, {"text": "Document Templates", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "Barcode Template", "bold": true}, {"text": ": "}, {"text": "SysDoc/printdocs/product/barcode/template.html", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the existing template by replacing it with the code below, and click "}, {"text": "Save.", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": We recommend backing-up all print docs before making modifications."}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "

Click "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set the print preferences in Mac"}], "data-id": "set-the-print-preferences-in-mac"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open Chrome or Safari and type in the address bar: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://localhost:631/printers/", "children": [{"text": "http://localhost:631/printers/"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Can’t see the Printer settings? Try enabling CUPS for your computer.", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Go to the Finder and select 'Applications' from the 'Go' menu."}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Double-click on the 'Utilities' folder and launch 'Terminal'."}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Enter 'cupsctl WebInterface=yes' and press enter."}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Go to the Chrome web browser and go to the address "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://localhost:631/printers/", "children": [{"text": "http://localhost:631/printers/"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the Dymo printer and choose Set Default Options."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the next page put your Label size code in the ‘Media Size’ box."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Media Size:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 30334"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Continuous Paper:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Disabled"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Output Resolution:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 300 DPI"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Halftoning:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Error Difusion"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Print Density:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Normal"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Print Quality:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Text Only"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Paper size 30334 equates to approximately 53.97 mm x 28.57mm.
